statement: In every magma, Equation 794 (`x = y * (z * ((w * x) * w))`) implies Equation 1626 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (u * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0465
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w x) w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op u w)))
